controls.control_objective: To ensure 27, 2008 and idmd
controls.control_description:
RESERVE BANK OF INDIA
www.rbi.org.in
RBI/FMRD/2024-25/124 FMRD.MIOD.No.04/11.01.041/2024-25


 October 18, 2024
To
All participants in Government Securities market
Madam/Sir,
Reserve Bank of India (Access Criteria for NDS-OM) Directions, 2024
A reference is invited to circulars IDMD.DOD.No.5893/10.25.66/2007-08 dated May 27,
2008 and IDMD.DOD.No.13/10.25.66/2011-12 dated November 18, 2011 issued by the
Reserve Bank on guidelines relating to access to Negotiated Dealing System-Order
Matching (NDS-OM) electronic trading platform.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to 27, 2008 and idmd

controls.control_objective: To ensure stand withdrawn
controls.control_description:
Accordingly, circulars IDMD.DOD.No.5893/10.25.66/2007-08 dated May 27, 2008 and
IDMD.DOD.No.13/10.25.66/2011-12 dated November 18, 2011 issued by the Reserve
Bank shall stand withdrawn.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to stand withdrawn

controls.control_objective: To ensure be deemed to have been granted under these directions and shall be governed by these directions from the date they come into effect
controls.control_description:
Direct access to NDS-OM granted in terms of these circulars
shall be deemed to have been granted under these Directions and shall be governed by
these Directions from the date they come into effect.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be deemed to have been granted under these directions and shall be governed by these directions from the date they come into effect

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applicable with immediate effect
controls.control_description: These Directions shall be applicable with immediate effect.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applicable with immediate effect

controls.control_objective: To ensure be called the reserve bank of india (access criteria for nds-om) directions, 2024
controls.control_description:
a) These Directions shall be called the Reserve Bank of India (Access Criteria for
NDS-OM) Directions, 2024.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be called the reserve bank of india (access criteria for nds-om) directions, 2024

controls.control_objective: To ensure come into force with effect from october 18, 2024
controls.control_description: b) These Directions shall come into force with effect from October 18, 2024.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to come into force with effect from october 18, 2024

controls.control_objective: To ensure mean export-import bank of india (exim bank), national bank for agriculture and rural development (nabard), national housing bank (nhb), small industr
controls.control_description:
Definitions:
In these Directions, unless the context otherwise requires:
a) "All India Financial Institution" shall mean Export-Import Bank of India (EXIM
Bank), National Bank for Agriculture and Rural Development (NABARD), National
Housing Bank (NHB), Small Industries Development Bank of India (SIDBI) and
National Bank for Financing Infrastructure and Development (NaBFID);
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to mean export-import bank of india (exim bank), national bank for agriculture and rural development (nabard), national housing bank (nhb), small industr

controls.control_objective: To ensure mean a banking company (including a local area bank, a payment bank and a small finance bank) as defined in clause (c) of section 5 of the banking reg
controls.control_description:
b) "Bank" shall mean a banking company (including a Local Area Bank, a Payment
Bank and a Small Finance Bank) as defined in clause (c) of section 5 of the
Banking Regulation Act, 1949 or a "regional rural bank", a "corresponding new
bank" or "State Bank of India" as defined in clauses (ja), (da) and (nc), of section
5 respectively thereof, or a "cooperative bank" as defined in clause (cci) of section
5 read with section 56 of the said Act;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to mean a banking company (including a local area bank, a payment bank and a small finance bank) as defined in clause (c) of section 5 of the banking reg

controls.control_objective: To ensure mean a bank appointed by the clearing corporation of india limited for the settlement of fund obligations of members of their securities settlement se
controls.control_description:
c) "Designated Settlement Bank (DSB)" shall mean a bank appointed by the
Clearing Corporation of India Limited for the settlement of fund obligations of
members of their securities settlement segment that are not maintaining a current
account with the Reserve Bank;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to mean a bank appointed by the clearing corporation of india limited for the settlement of fund obligations of members of their securities settlement se

controls.control_objective: To ensure mean access to nds-om wherein an entity that is party to a transaction directly executes/reports the transaction on/to the platform and such transacti
controls.control_description:
<image>
d) "Direct Access" shall mean access to NDS-OM wherein an entity that is party to a
transaction directly executes/reports the transaction on/to the platform and such
transactions are settled in its own Subsidiary General Ledger (SGL) account;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to mean access to nds-om wherein an entity that is party to a transaction directly executes/reports the transaction on/to the platform and such transacti

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the same meaning as assigned to it in section 2(1) (iii) of the electronic trading platforms (reserve bank) directions, 2018 dated october 05, 20
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the same meaning as assigned to it in section 2(1) (iii) of the electronic trading platforms (reserve bank) directions, 2018 dated october 05, 20

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the same meaning as assigned to it in section 2(f) of the government securities act, 2006
controls.control_description:
f) "Government Security" shall have the same meaning as assigned to it in Section
2(f) of the Government Securities Act, 2006;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the same meaning as assigned to it in section 2(f) of the government securities act, 2006

controls.control_objective: To ensure mean access to nds-om wherein an entity undertakes its transactions through another entity that has a direct access to nds-om and which assumes respon
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to mean access to nds-om wherein an entity undertakes its transactions through another entity that has a direct access to nds-om and which assumes respon

controls.control_objective: To ensure mean the etp authorised by the reserve bank under the electronic trading platforms (reserve bank) directions, 2018 dated october 05, 2018, for transac
controls.control_description:
h) "Negotiated Dealing System-Order Matching (NDS-OM)" shall mean the ETP
authorised by the Reserve Bank under the Electronic Trading Platforms (Reserve
Bank) Directions, 2018 dated October 05, 2018, for transactions in Government
securities;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to mean the etp authorised by the reserve bank under the electronic trading platforms (reserve bank) directions, 2018 dated october 05, 2018, for transac

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the same meaning as assigned to it in section 45-i (f) of the act
controls.control_description:
i) "Non-Banking Financial Company" shall have the same meaning as assigned to
it in Section 45-I (f) of the Act.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the same meaning as assigned to it in section 45-i (f) of the act

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the same meaning as assigned to them in the act or under the government securities act, 2006
controls.control_description:
Words and expressions used, but not defined in these Directions, shall have the
same meaning as assigned to them in the Act or under the Government Securities
Act, 2006.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the same meaning as assigned to them in the act or under the government securities act, 2006

controls.control_objective: To ensure be eligible to access nds-om either through direct access or through indirect access
controls.control_description:
Any person/entity eligible to invest in Government securities in terms of the applicable
rules/ guidelines issued by the Government of India / State Governments / the Reserve
Bank, as amended from time to time shall be eligible to access NDS-OM either through
direct access or through indirect access.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be eligible to access nds-om either through direct access or through indirect access

controls.control_objective: To ensure be eligible for direct access to nds-om subject to fulfilment of all requirements and conditions stipulated in these directions: a) banks
controls.control_description:
Eligible Entities
The following entities shall be eligible for direct access to NDS-OM subject to fulfilment
of all requirements and conditions stipulated in these Directions:
a) Banks;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be eligible for direct access to nds-om subject to fulfilment of all requirements and conditions stipulated in these directions: a) banks

controls.control_objective: To ensure specifically permit subject to such terms and conditions that it may prescribe
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to specifically permit subject to such terms and conditions that it may prescribe

controls.control_objective: To ensure specifically permit
controls.control_description:
and
j) Any other entity that the Reserve Bank may specifically permit.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to specifically permit

controls.control_objective: To ensure fulfil the following requirements: a) sgl account with the reserve bank
controls.control_description:
Requirements for seeking direct access to NDS-OM
Entities that are eligible to seek direct access to NDS-OM shall fulfil the following
requirements:
a) SGL account with the Reserve Bank;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to fulfil the following requirements: a) sgl account with the reserve bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure seek direct access through an application in the format given in annex to the chief general manager, financial markets regulation department, reserve
controls.control_description:
Application for seeking direct access to NDS-OM
Entities eligible for direct access to NDS-OM in terms of paragraph (4) of these
Directions and meeting the requirements stipulated in paragraph (5) of these
Directions may seek direct access through an application in the format given
in Annex to the Chief General Manager, Financial Markets Regulation Department,
Reserve Bank of India, 9th Floor, Central Office Building, Shahid Bhagat Singh Marg,
Mumbai - 400001.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to seek direct access through an application in the format given in annex to the chief general manager, financial markets regulation department, reserve

controls.control_objective: To ensure , alternatively, seek direct access through the procedure stipulated under the master directions on access criteria for payment systems (master direct
controls.control_description:
Such entities may, alternatively, seek direct access through the
procedure stipulated under the Master Directions on Access Criteria for Payment
Systems (Master Direction DPSS.CO.OD.No.1846/04.04.009/2016-17 dated January
17, 2017) as amended from time to time.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to , alternatively, seek direct access through the procedure stipulated under the master directions on access criteria for payment systems (master direct

controls.control_objective: To ensure , after being satisfied that the applicant fulfils the eligibility criteria, grant direct access to nds-om subject to the terms and conditions stipula
controls.control_description:
Grant of direct access to NDS-OM
a) The Reserve Bank may, after being satisfied that the applicant fulfils the eligibility
criteria, grant direct access to NDS-OM subject to the terms and conditions
stipulated therein.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to , after being satisfied that the applicant fulfils the eligibility criteria, grant direct access to nds-om subject to the terms and conditions stipula

controls.control_description:

controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to <image> i

controls.control_objective: To ensure furnish such additional information and clarification
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to furnish such additional information and clarification

controls.control_objective: To ensure impose additional conditions if the entity is found to violate the provisions of these directions or any other rules or regulations or conditions of a
controls.control_description:
c) Direct access to NDS-OM granted to an entity is not transferable and the Reserve
Bank may impose additional conditions if the entity is found to violate the
provisions of these Directions or any other rules or regulations or conditions of
access.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to impose additional conditions if the entity is found to violate the provisions of these directions or any other rules or regulations or conditions of a

controls.control_objective: To ensure suspend/terminate the direct access to nds-om issued to an entity, after affording a reasonable opportunity to be heard
controls.control_description:
d) The Reserve Bank may suspend/terminate the direct access to NDS-OM issued
to an entity, after affording a reasonable opportunity to be heard, if it is satisfied
that:
i.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to suspend/terminate the direct access to nds-om issued to an entity, after affording a reasonable opportunity to be heard

controls.control_objective: To ensure avail indirect access to nds-om if: a) it is not an entity eligible for direct access to nds-om in terms of paragraph 4 of these directions
controls.control_description:
Any person/entity eligible to invest in Government securities may avail indirect access
to NDS-OM if:
a) it is not an entity eligible for direct access to NDS-OM in terms of paragraph 4 of
these Directions;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to avail indirect access to nds-om if: a) it is not an entity eligible for direct access to nds-om in terms of paragraph 4 of these directions

controls.control_objective: To ensure be through an entity which has a direct access to nds-om, and which agrees to assume responsibility to settle the transactions undertaken by the entit
controls.control_description:
Indirect access to NDS-OM shall be through an entity which has a direct access to
NDS-OM, and which agrees to assume responsibility to settle the transactions
undertaken by the entity seeking indirect access.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be through an entity which has a direct access to nds-om, and which agrees to assume responsibility to settle the transactions undertaken by the entit

controls.control_objective: To ensure at its discretion, choose to avail indirect access to nds-om, instead of direct access
controls.control_description:
IDMD.CDD.S788/11.22.001/2021-22 dated September 22, 2021), as amended from
time to time, may at its discretion, choose to avail indirect access to NDS-OM, instead
of direct access.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to at its discretion, choose to avail indirect access to nds-om, instead of direct access
